name: Customer Trend and Early Warning Agent
tagline: Detect early signs of revenue decline or customer inactivity before it becomes a problem
description: Continuously monitors customer purchasing behaviour to detect early signs of revenue decline, ordering slowdown, or full inactivity. Analyses historical and current sales order and invoice data by customer and part to identify deviations from normal buying patterns, providing risk classification, explainable insights, and timely alerts for sales teams.
